title: CASA Functional SME
description:
Key Responsibilities

Functional Leadership

·       Analyze the business requirements and convert them to technical requirements for the CASA platform implementation, ensuring alignment with enterprise architecture, IT standards and business objectives.

·       Be a “go to” person for all functional needs for the requirements

·       Be a trusted advisor for business stakeholders on the functional implementations

·       Establish and enforce governance needs, compliance with security, scalability and performance requirements.

Solution Design, Development and Integration

·       Be part of the solution design and development discussions. Provide inputs for the seamless integration with vendor solutions like Oracle FLEXCUBE and with bank’s core and downstream systems like Payments / Trade Finance / Lending / Markets.

·       Take ownership for the data models and dictionaries between systems for the appropriate integration

·       Have a complete control on the requirements for the integrations with third-party CASA systems and regulatory systems

·       Support system migration, ensuring minimal disruption and data integrity during transitional phases.

·       Collaborate with vendors, internal IT teams, and stakeholders to provide the required solutions and troubleshoot issues wherever applicable.

Risk and Quality Management

·       Identify and mitigate operational and technical risks throughout the project lifecycle, ensuring high-quality deliverables that meet business and regulatory requirements.

·       Conduct configuration reviews, performance tuning to ensure robust and scalable implementations.

Stakeholder and Vendor Management

·       Work closely with business stakeholders, IT teams, and vendors to ensure alignment between technical and business objectives.

·       Act as the primary liaison between internal teams and platform vendors, ensuring smooth integration and issue resolution.

·       Provide functional insights and updates to senior management, supporting strategic decision-making and project governance.

Key Skills and Qualifications

·       Education:

o   Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.

·       Certifications:

o   Any cloud certifications could be added advantage (AWS or Azure)

o   SWIFT Certifications if any, for instance, ISO 20022, could be value add.

o   Other Product Certifications will be advantageous.

·       ISO 20022 Knowledge:

o   ISO 20022 knowledge on the message formats for SWIFT

o   Hands on experience working with both MT and MX message details and nuances


Years of Experience

·       20+/15+ years of experience in functional roles, including business analysis, test case review, solution design, integration, and implementation.

·       15+/10+ years of experience working on CASA Systems (Experience in working with Oracle FLEXCUBE will be added advantage)

·       Experience on Payments / Trade Finance / Lending / Markets would be added advantage

postedCompany.description: The Company's principal activity is manpower contracting services with other information technology and computer services.
postedCompany.name: EXCELTECH COMPUTERS PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D16 Upper East Coast, Bedok, Eastwood, Kew Drive
